languages.text: {n}Покрытые пылью и кровью бойцы Заркова столпились вокруг Себериана, негромко переговариваясь. Сам Себериан выглядит немногим лучше — часть его аугментики повреждена, и на пол стекают тягучие струйки священных масел. Заметив вас, он жестом заставляет солдат умолкнуть.{/n} "{name}. Мое время пришло".

{n}Covered in dust and blood, the Zarkovian soldiers crowd around Seberian, quietly talking to each other. Seberian himself hardly looks better: some of his augmetics are damaged and his sacred unguent slowly drips onto the floor. He sees you and gestures the soldiers to be silent.{/n} "{name}. My time has come."
languages.original_text: {n}Покрытые пылью и кровью бойцы Заркова столпились вокруг Себериана, негромко переговариваясь. Мое время пришло".

languages.text: {n}Die mit Staub und Blut bedeckten zarkovianischen Soldaten scharen sich um Seberian und tuscheln leise miteinander. Seberian selbst sieht nicht viel besser aus. Einige seiner Augmentationen sind beschädigt, und seine heilige Substanz tropft langsam auf den Boden. Als er dich sieht, bringt er seine Soldaten mit einer Geste zum Schweigen.{/n} "{name}. Meine Zeit ist gekommen."
languages.original_text: {n}Covered in dust and blood, the Zarkovian soldiers crowd around Seberian, quietly talking to each other. Seberian himself hardly looks better: some of his augmetics are damaged and his sacred unguent slowly drips onto the floor. He sees you and gestures the soldiers to be silent.{/n} "{name}. My time has come."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die mit Staub und Blut bedeckten zarkovianischen Soldaten scharen sich um Seberian und tuscheln leise miteinander. Seberian selbst sieht nicht viel besser aus. Einige seiner Augmentationen sind beschädigt, und seine heilige Substanz tropft langsam auf den Boden. Als er dich sieht, bringt er seine Soldaten mit einer Geste zum Schweigen.{/n} "{name}. Meine Zeit ist gekommen."

languages.text: {n}Recouverts de poussière et de sang, les soldats de Zarkov sont attroupés autour de Seberian, discutant tout bas les uns avec les autres. Quant à Seberian, il n'est guère plus vaillant : certains de ses augmétiques sont abîmés, et son onguent sacré goutte doucement au sol. Il vous aperçoit et fait signe aux soldats de se taire.{/n} « {name}. Mon heure est venue. »
languages.original_text: {n}Covered in dust and blood, the Zarkovian soldiers crowd around Seberian, quietly talking to each other. Seberian himself hardly looks better: some of his augmetics are damaged and his sacred unguent slowly drips onto the floor. He sees you and gestures the soldiers to be silent.{/n} "{name}. My time has come."

traits.locale_text: {n}Recouverts de poussière et de sang, les soldats de Zarkov sont attroupés autour de Seberian, discutant tout bas les uns avec les autres. Quant à Seberian, il n'est guère plus vaillant : certains de ses augmétiques sont abîmés, et son onguent sacré goutte doucement au sol. Il vous aperçoit et fait signe aux soldats de se taire.{/n} « {name}. Mon heure est venue. »

languages.text: {n}Cubiertos de polvo y sangre, los soldados zarkovianos se reúnen en torno a Seberian, hablando entre ellos en voz queda. El propio Seberian comparte su aspecto maltrecho: algunos de sus auméticos están dañados y su ungüento sagrado gotea lentamente hasta el suelo. Cuando te ve, indica a los soldados que guarden silencio.{/n} «{name}. Ha llegado mi hora».
languages.original_text: {n}Covered in dust and blood, the Zarkovian soldiers crowd around Seberian, quietly talking to each other. Seberian himself hardly looks better: some of his augmetics are damaged and his sacred unguent slowly drips onto the floor. He sees you and gestures the soldiers to be silent.{/n} "{name}. My time has come."

traits.locale_text: {n}Cubiertos de polvo y sangre, los soldados zarkovianos se reúnen en torno a Seberian, hablando entre ellos en voz queda. El propio Seberian comparte su aspecto maltrecho: algunos de sus auméticos están dañados y su ungüento sagrado gotea lentamente hasta el suelo. Cuando te ve, indica a los soldados que guarden silencio.{/n} «{name}. Ha llegado mi hora».

languages.text: {n}Toz ve kan içindeki Zarkovlu askerler; Seberian'ın etrafına toplanmış, kendi aralarında sessizce konuşuyorlar. Seberian'ın kendisi de pek iyi görünmüyor: Ogmetiklerinin bir kısmı hasar görmüş ve kutsal özyağı yavaş yavaş yere damlıyor. Seni görüyor ve askerlere susmalarını işaret ediyor.{/n} "{name}. Vakit geldi."
languages.original_text: {n}Covered in dust and blood, the Zarkovian soldiers crowd around Seberian, quietly talking to each other. Seberian himself hardly looks better: some of his augmetics are damaged and his sacred unguent slowly drips onto the floor. He sees you and gestures the soldiers to be silent.{/n} "{name}. My time has come."

Seberian'ın kendisi de pek iyi görünmüyor: Ogmetiklerinin bir kısmı hasar görmüş ve kutsal özyağı yavaş yavaş yere damlıyor. Seni görüyor ve askerlere susmalarını işaret ediyor.{/n} "{name}. Vakit geldi."

languages.text: {n}满身尘土和血污的扎尔科夫士兵簇拥在塞贝里安身边，低声交谈着。塞贝里安本人的状态也好不到哪里去：他的一些植入物受损了，神圣机油正缓缓滴落在地。他看见了你，示意士兵们安静下来。{/n}“{name}，我的时候到了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Covered in dust and blood, the Zarkovian soldiers crowd around Seberian, quietly talking to each other. Seberian himself hardly looks better: some of his augmetics are damaged and his sacred unguent slowly drips onto the floor. He sees you and gestures the soldiers to be silent.{/n} "{name}. My time has come."

traits.locale_text: {n}满身尘土和血污的扎尔科夫士兵簇拥在塞贝里安身边，低声交谈着。塞贝里安本人的状态也好不到哪里去：他的一些植入物受损了，神圣机油正缓缓滴落在地。他看见了你，示意士兵们安静下来。{/n}“{name}，我的时候到了。”

languages.text: {n}ザルコフの兵士たちは、埃と血にまみれてセベリアンの周りに群がり、互いに小声で言葉を交わしている。セベリアン自身も大して良い状態には見えない。オーグメティックのいくつかは損傷し、聖なる軟膏が床へとゆっくり滴り落ちている。彼は君に気づき、兵士たちに静まるよう身振りで示す。{/n}「{name}。私の時が来た。」
languages.original_text: {n}Covered in dust and blood, the Zarkovian soldiers crowd around Seberian, quietly talking to each other. Seberian himself hardly looks better: some of his augmetics are damaged and his sacred unguent slowly drips onto the floor. He sees you and gestures the soldiers to be silent.{/n} "{name}. My time has come."
